title: Homeownership Made Possible
audience: Minority first-time homebuyers in Marion County
goal: Encourage viewers to check if they qualify for down payment assistance
hook: The down payment isn't the barrier you think it is — not if you live in Marion County.

scenes.headline: The down payment isn't the barrier you think it is — not if you live in Marion County.
scenes.voiceover: The down payment isn't the barrier you think it is — not if you live in Marion County.

assets.description: Cinematic close-up of a Black woman, worried and exhausted, sitting in a dim apartment — portrait, dramatic side light

scenes.headline: Backup headline if lines not used
scenes.voiceover: Many believe homeownership is out of reach because of the down payment.

scenes.headline: Grants available for you!
scenes.body: What if I told you that there are grants available specifically for minority first-time homebuyers? These grants can cover your entire down payment.
scenes.voiceover: But what if I told you that there are grants available specifically for minority first-time homebuyers? These grants can cover your entire down payment.

scenes.headline: Imagine the joy!
scenes.body: You could own a home without needing to put any money down. Imagine holding the keys to your first home.
scenes.voiceover: Imagine holding the keys to your first home and feeling the joy and relief that comes with it.

assets.description: Cinematic portrait of a joyful Black family holding house keys outside their first home, tears of joy, warm golden hour light

scenes.headline: Check your eligibility!
scenes.cta_text: See if you qualify — it takes 2 minutes
scenes.voiceover: See if you qualify — it takes just 2 minutes.

voiceover_script: The down payment isn't the barrier you think it is — not if you live in Marion County. Many believe homeownership is out of reach because of the down payment. But what if I told you that there are grants available specifically for minority first-time homebuyers? These grants can cover your entire down payment, meaning you could own a home without needing to put any money down. Imagine holding the keys to your first home and feeling the joy and relief that comes with it. See if you qualify — it takes just 2 minutes.
thumbnail_concept: A joyful Black family holding house keys in front of their new home.
caption: Homeownership is closer than you think. Check your eligibility today!
caption_hook: Think a down payment is a barrier?
